sentences.en: The attribution model shows that social media drives most top-of-funnel awareness.
sentences.zh: 归因模型显示社交媒体驱动了大部分漏斗顶端的品牌认知。

sentences.en: We saw a 30% uplift in sign-ups after launching the influencer campaign.
sentences.zh: 启动KOL营销活动后，注册量提升了30%。

sentences.en: Organic search traffic has been declining since the algorithm update.
sentences.zh: 自从算法更新后，自然搜索流量一直在下降。

sentences.en: The payback period on our paid channels shortened from 9 months to 6.
sentences.zh: 付费渠道的回收周期从9个月缩短到了6个月。

sentences.en: We should segment users by intent to personalize the welcome email sequence.
sentences.zh: 我们应该按用户意图分层，个性化欢迎邮件序列。

example.en: Multi-touch attribution gives credit to every channel in the user journey.
example.zh: 多触点归因会将功劳分配给用户旅程中的每个渠道。

example.en: The A/B test delivered a 15% uplift in click-through rate.
example.zh: A/B测试带来了点击率15%的提升。

example.en: Organic growth is more sustainable than paid growth in the long run.
example.zh: 从长远来看，自然增长比付费增长更可持续。

example.en: A shorter payback period means faster return on marketing investment.
example.zh: 更短的回收周期意味着营销投资更快获得回报。

example.en: We segment our user base by trading frequency and asset size.
example.zh: 我们按交易频率和资产规模对用户进行分层。

sentences.en: The bounce rate on the pricing page suggests users find the tiers confusing.
sentences.zh: 定价页的跳出率表明用户觉得套餐层级令人困惑。

sentences.en: We need to define success metrics before building the feature.
sentences.zh: 在开发功能之前，我们需要先定义成功指标。

sentences.en: Session duration increased after we redesigned the content feed.
sentences.zh: 重新设计内容信息流后，会话时长增加了。

sentences.en: The beta release received mixed feedback from power users.
sentences.zh: 测试版发布收到了资深用户的褒贬不一的反馈。

sentences.en: We track funnel drop-off at each step to identify friction points.
sentences.zh: 我们追踪每一步的漏斗流失，以识别摩擦点。

example.en: A high bounce rate often indicates poor page load speed or irrelevant content.
example.zh: 高跳出率通常意味着页面加载速度慢或内容不相关。

example.en: The premium tier includes real-time market data and priority support.
example.zh: 高级层级包含实时行情数据和优先客服支持。

example.en: Average session duration is a key indicator of content quality.
example.zh: 平均会话时长是内容质量的关键指标。

example.en: We invite loyal users to join the beta program for early access.
example.zh: 我们邀请忠实用户加入测试版计划，获得提前体验。

example.en: Removing friction from the checkout flow boosted conversion by 20%.
example.zh: 减少结账流程的摩擦后，转化率提升了20%。

sentences.en: The yield curve inversion historically signals a recession within 12 to 18 months.
sentences.zh: 收益率曲线倒挂在历史上预示12到18个月内会出现衰退。

sentences.en: Short sellers increased their positions ahead of the earnings report.
sentences.zh: 空头在财报发布前增加了头寸。

sentences.en: The company announced a share buyback program worth $500 million.
sentences.zh: 该公司宣布了一项价值5亿美元的股票回购计划。

sentences.en: Net asset value per share declined due to unrealized losses in the bond portfolio.
sentences.zh: 由于债券组合中的未实现亏损，每股净资产价值下降了。

sentences.en: Institutional investors are rotating out of growth stocks into defensives.
sentences.zh: 机构投资者正在从成长股轮动到防御性板块。

example.en: A steepening yield curve often benefits bank stocks.
example.zh: 收益率曲线变陡通常利好银行股。

example.en: Short sellers profit when the stock price falls below their entry point.
example.zh: 当股价跌破入场价时，做空者获利。

example.en: Share buybacks reduce the number of outstanding shares and boost EPS.
example.zh: 股票回购减少流通股数量，提升每股收益。

example.en: Unrealized gains do not count as taxable income until the asset is sold.
example.zh: 未实现收益在资产出售前不计为应税收入。

example.en: Sector rotation is a common strategy during market regime changes.
example.zh: 行业轮动是市场风格切换时的常见策略。

sentences.en: The skip-level meeting helped me understand frontline concerns directly.
sentences.zh: 跨级会议帮助我直接了解了一线团队的顾虑。

sentences.en: We are piloting a four-day workweek to measure its impact on productivity.
sentences.zh: 我们正在试行四天工作制，以衡量其对生产力的影响。

sentences.en: The performance review cycle starts next Monday so please finalize your self-assessments.
sentences.zh: 绩效考核周期下周一开始，请完成你的自评。

sentences.en: Delegation is not about dumping tasks but empowering people to own outcomes.
sentences.zh: 授权不是甩锅任务，而是赋能他人对结果负责。

sentences.en: The team morale dipped after the reorganization announcement.
sentences.zh: 组织架构调整公布后，团队士气有所下降。

example.en: Skip-level one-on-ones give senior leaders unfiltered insights.
example.zh: 跨级一对一让高管获得未经过滤的洞察。

example.en: We decided to pilot the new tool with one team before rolling it out company-wide.
example.zh: 我们决定先在一个团队试点新工具，再全公司推广。

example.en: A thoughtful self-assessment helps your manager write a more accurate review.
example.zh: 用心的自评能帮助你的经理写出更准确的评估。

example.en: Effective delegation requires clear context, not just clear instructions.
example.zh: 有效的授权需要清晰的背景，而不仅仅是清晰的指令。

example.en: Celebrating small wins is a simple way to boost team morale.
example.zh: 庆祝小胜利是提升团队士气的简单方法。

sentences.en: The land-and-expand model works best when the initial product has low switching costs.
sentences.zh: 当初始产品的转换成本较低时，先落地再扩展的模式效果最好。

sentences.en: We need a clear hypothesis before committing resources to this new market.
sentences.zh: 在投入资源进入新市场之前，我们需要一个明确的假设。

sentences.en: The regulatory landscape in Hong Kong differs significantly from mainland China.
sentences.zh: 香港的监管环境与中国大陆有显著不同。

sentences.en: Our go-to-market strategy relies heavily on partnerships with local brokers.
sentences.zh: 我们的市场进入策略严重依赖与本地券商的合作。

sentences.en: Second-mover advantage allows us to learn from competitors' mistakes.
sentences.zh: 后发优势让我们能从竞争对手的错误中学习。

example.en: The land-and-expand playbook starts with a free tier to build initial adoption.
example.zh: 先落地再扩展的打法从免费层级开始，建立初始采用。

example.en: Every growth experiment should start with a testable hypothesis.
example.zh: 每个增长实验都应从一个可验证的假设开始。

example.en: Regulatory compliance is a barrier to entry in the financial services industry.
example.zh: 监管合规是金融服务行业的进入壁垒。

example.en: A strong go-to-market plan covers pricing, distribution, and messaging.
example.zh: 强有力的市场进入计划涵盖定价、分销和信息传递。

example.en: Being a second-mover lets you avoid the pioneer's costly trial and error.
example.zh: 作为后发者可以避免先驱者代价高昂的试错。
